title: getSyntaxProperty()
text: getSyntaxProperty() Retrieves the value of the specified syntax property for a field. Return = FieldObject . getSyntaxProperty ( SyntaxProperty ) Arguments SyntaxProperty Name of a supported field syntax property. Return value Return Value of the named syntax property. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Description The getSyntaxProperty function only returns the specified property if it was set in the browser using JavaScript, not if it was set in the server before being sent to the browser. The get the value of syntax properties from the field definition, use the getDeclarativeSyntax function. Table 1. Syntax Properties Supported by the JavaScript API Property JavaScript Data Type Values Description/Remarks NED Unsupported. Use property html:readOnly instead — No edit allowed in this field. DIM Unsupported. Use property html:disabled instead — Dim field. No edit and no prompt. REX string Uniface entry format as regex string Regex string for data entry. For example, "/[a-z]*/i" (zero or more [a-zA-Z]). For more information, see Field Syntax Codes . ENT string Uniface entry format as syntax string Syntax for data entry. For example, "&*" (zero or more [a-zA-Z]). For more information, see Field Syntax Codes . LEN object { min: Number , max: Number } Length of field or subfield. ASC boolean ASCII, in Unicode range 00-7F BRM boolean Check that brackets match. DIG boolean Digits only (0-9) DLS boolean Delete leading spaces. DLZ boolean Delete leading zeros. LOW boolean All lowercase MAN boolean Mandatory field (minimum length of one). NUM boolean Numbers only (0-9, . + -) RCS boolean Replace contiguous spaces with one space. UPC boolean All uppercase Related Links Field Syntax Codes Field syntax codes specify the data entry pattern, the allowed characters, and whether fields are mandatory or read-only. getDeclarativeSyntax() Return a JavaScript object containing the field syntax properties as defined in the field's definition. clearSyntaxProperty() Restores the initial value of the specified syntax property. getSyntaxProperties() Retrieves field syntax properties that were set in the browser (using the setSyntaxProperty or setSyntaxProperties functions). setSyntaxProperty() Retrieves the value of the specified syntax property for a field. uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
